title: NEFT fee table
content: Branch-initiated NEFT transfers up to Rs. 10,000 cost Rs. 2 plus GST. Transfers from Rs. 10,001 to Rs. 1,00,000 cost Rs. 4 plus GST. Transfers above Rs. 1,00,000 cost Rs. 6 plus GST.

title: UPI note
content: UPI person-to-person payments are normally free for customers. Charges only appear when a third-party service or merchant wallet is involved.
